untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of 'established uptrend' via higher highs/higher lows pattern - requires multi-bar lookback logic not expressible in single-condition format; (2) 'MACD does not make new extreme low vs recent pullback lows' - requires comparative lookback across variable periods and relative extrema detection; (3) 'relative strength measure confirms leader still in control' - undefined indicator, unclear what 'leader' means in context; (4) parametric thresholds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are not specified with concrete values; (5) 'pullback exceeds X% of prior move' requires calculation of prior swing magnitude. Core pattern-matching logic cannot be fully captured with allowed operators and single-condition format.
translation_notes: Attempted LONG-only structure based on 'pullback into trending strength' interpretation. Entry uses: price above MA (trend), price below recent high (pullback), MACD histogram not at extreme low (momentum check), RSI not oversold (strength). Exit triggers on MACD extreme or price weakness. However, the signal's multi-bar pattern recognition requirements and undefined relative strength measure make this a partial translation only.
